name: Zero Database (Realistic RPG with Limitless)
description: In 2004, abilities were found out when a very rare virus, known as JPG (labelled after the file, because everyone that contracted the virus saw a "image" in their mind, foreshadowing their ability) swept the entire world, allowing people to actually use things like that that is something out of a superhero movie. Nearly all the population has superpowers, specifically 85%, however, their abilities are QUITE limited, and nothing extremely serious, like time manipulation, etc. There's even a school to dedicate themselves to training such individuals. So, who will you be?
creator: ArtistDagoat
